series_metadata.series_description: Copies of Fleet Management Chargeback files consisting of DAS/Invoice (ADM 7008) and copies of the Vendor receipts. Fleet Management pays all bills for damage to leased or rental vehicles.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in operating area for Two (2) Fiscal Years, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
